scripts.dev: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 || (echo 'api: skipping dev (uv not installed)' && exit 0)
scripts.build: echo 'No build step for Python API'
scripts.lint: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv run ruff check . || (echo 'api: skipping lint (uv not installed)' && exit 0)
scripts.lint:fix: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv run ruff check --fix . || (echo 'api: skipping lint:fix (uv not installed)' && exit 0)
scripts.check: uv run python -c "from app.main import app"
